summary: Target Calculator (Capa de Targets) - All 18 API tests passed + 22 internal engine tests passed. Feature fully functional.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/calculator/targets - Canonical case H80 BF20 volumen: P_e=190, H_e=170, G_e=60, P_pe=45, H_pe=50, P_d=225, H_d=170, G_d=60
✅ POST /api/calculator/targets - Mujer 60kg 25%BF definición returns valid macros
✅ POST /api/calculator/targets - Peso fuera de rango alto 130kg clamps to 120
✅ POST /api/calculator/targets - Peso fuera de rango bajo 55kg (hombre) clamps to 60
✅ POST /api/calculator/targets - Mujer peso bajo 45kg clamps to 50
✅ POST /api/calculator/targets - BF fuera de rango bajo 8% (hombre) clamps to 10%
✅ POST /api/calculator/targets/apply - Applies macros to profile successfully
✅ GET /api/macros - Returns applied macros with source='auto'
✅ POST /api/chatbot/start - Chatbot reads auto-calculated macros correctly (p_entreno=190, h_entreno=170, g_entreno=60)
✅ GET /api/calculator/test-targets - Internal engine passes all 22 tests
✅ Invariant: P and G same for volumen/definición, only H changes
✅ Derivation: masa_grasa=16, masa_magra=64, masa_trabajo≈75.29 calculated correctly
critical_code_review_comments: target_calculator.py: Well-structured with clear separation of concerns - _load_tables(), _snap_to_nearest(), calcular_targets(), targets_to_profile_macros()
target_calculator.py: Proper handling of accent normalization in _normalize_obj() for 'definición'
target_calculator.py: Correct snapping logic - rounds to nearest step, clamps to extremes when out of range
routes/calculator.py: /targets and /targets/apply endpoints properly validate required fields
routes/users.py: Profile update auto-calculates macros when body data changes (unless macros_source='manual')
routes/chatbot.py: chatbot_start correctly reads macros from profile (proteinas/hidratos/grasas format)
macros_tables.json: Contains 404 records (208 hombre + 196 mujer) as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Target Calculator (Capa de Targets) fully tested. Endpoints: POST /api/calculator/targets (calculate), POST /api/calculator/targets/apply (calculate and apply to profile), GET /api/calculator/test-targets (internal tests). Uses macros_tables.json with 404 combinations. Snapping: Hombre pesos [60-120 step 5], BFs [10-45 step 5]. Mujer pesos [50-115 step 5], BFs [20-50 step 5]. Invariant: P and G same for volumen/definición, only H changes. Chatbot reads macros from profile correctly.
